product_overview: A Django + DRF backend API for managing a local retail store: token-based authentication, inventory (categories & products), customers, employees, and sales with stock management and sale cancellation.
core_goals: Provide secure token-based authentication for employees to operate the API
Manage inventory with categories and products, including stock tracking
Enable creating, listing and cancelling sales with atomic stock adjustments
Allow CRUD operations for customers and read-only access to employees
Surface a clear, testable REST API contract suitable for frontend and integrations

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Authenticate employees using token-based login and allow logout to invalidate tokens.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token
POST /api/v1/users/login/ with invalid credentials -> Receive 400 Invalid credentials
POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/users/logout/ Authorization: Token <token> -> Receive 200 Successfully logged out
POST /api/v1/users/logout/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Authentication credentials were not provided

features.name: Inventory Management API
features.description: List and create categories and products; products track price and stock and belong to categories.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/inventory/categories/ Authorization: Token <token> with body {"name":"Beverages"} -> Receive 201 Category (id: <category_id>) -> POST /api/v1/inventory/products/ Authorization: Token <token> with body {"name":"Coffee","price":"3.50","stock":10,"category":<category_id>} -> Receive 201 Product -> GET /api/v1/inventory/products/ Authorization: Token <token> -> Receive 200 Product[]

POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/inventory/products/ Authorization: Token <token> with body missing required fields (e.g. no name or price) -> Receive 400 Validation error
GET /api/v1/inventory/products/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Authentication credentials were not provided

features.name: Customer Management API
features.description: List and create customers used optionally when registering sales.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/users/customers/ Authorization: Token <token> with body {"name":"ACME Ltd","phone":"099123456"} -> Receive 201 Customer -> GET /api/v1/users/customers/ Authorization: Token <token> -> Receive 200 Customer[]

POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/users/customers/ Authorization: Token <token> with invalid body (e.g. name omitted) -> Receive 400 Validation error
GET /api/v1/users/customers/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Authentication credentials were not provided

features.name: Sales Management API
features.description: Create sales that decrement product stock atomically, list sales, and cancel sales to restore stock.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/sales/ Authorization: Token <token> with body {"customer":1,"items":[{"product":3,"quantity":2},{"product":7,"quantity":1}]} where all products have sufficient stock -> Receive 201 Sale -> GET /api/v1/sales/ Authorization: Token <token> -> Receive 200 Sale[]

POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/sales/ Authorization: Token <token> with body containing an item whose quantity exceeds stock -> Receive 409 Insufficient stock

POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/sales/ Authorization: Token <token> with invalid payload (e.g. malformed items) -> Receive 400 Validation error

POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/v1/sales/ Authorization: Token <token> with valid body -> Receive 201 Sale (id: <sale_id>) -> PATCH /api/v1/sales/<sale_id>/ Authorization: Token <token> with body {"action":"cancel"} -> Receive 200 Sale (state: CANCELLED) and product stock restored

POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> PATCH /api/v1/sales/<already_cancelled_id>/ Authorization: Token <token> with body {"action":"cancel"} -> Receive 409 Sale already cancelled

features.name: Employee Management API
features.description: Retrieve lists and details of employee users; employee accounts are created by the superuser via admin.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> GET /api/v1/users/ Authorization: Token <token> -> Receive 200 User[]
POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> GET /api/v1/users/<id>/ Authorization: Token <token> for an existing user -> Receive 200 User
GET /api/v1/users/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Authentication credentials were not provided
POST /api/v1/users/login/ with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> GET /api/v1/users/<nonexistent_id>/ Authorization: Token <token> -> Receive 404 User not found

features.name: Inventory Management API
features.description: CRUD operations for categories and products

known_limitations.issue: No input validation on product creation

known_limitations.impact: Large datasets may cause performance issues

known_limitations.issue: No rate limiting on API endpoints
known_limitations.impact: Potential for abuse and DoS attacks
